programme.title: What Would You Do?
programme.desc: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

programme.title: Resurrecting the Champ
programme.desc: An up-and-coming sports reporter rescues a homeless man, only to discover that he's a boxing legend believed to have passed away. What begins as an opportunity to resurrect Champ's story and escape the shadow of his father's success becomes a personal journey as the ambitious reporter reexamines his own life and his relationship with his family.

programme.title: Trading Paint
programme.desc: A down-and-out stock car racing legend (John Travolta) is drawn back to the dirt track when his son (Toby Sebastian), an aspiring driver, joins a rival racing team, which sparks an intense and dangerous competition between father and son.

programme.title: Coming Through The Rye
programme.desc: A sensitive young boy, believes he is destined to adapt “Catcher in the Rye” to portray Holden Caulfield. He must go in search of J.D. Salinger for permission, and on the way confronts love, sex and loss.

programme.title: Transpecos
programme.desc: For three Border Patrol agents working a remote desert checkpoint, the contents of one car will reveal an insidious plot within their own ranks. The next 24 hours will take them on a treacherous journey that could cost them their lives.

programme.title: Clockwatchers
programme.desc: The relationship between four female temps all working for the same credit company is threatened with the arrival of a new hire, who lands a permanent position one of the women was vying for.

programme.title: King of California
programme.desc: After being released from a mental institution, an unstable dad tries to convince his daughter that there's Spanish gold buried somewhere under suburbia. Starring Michael Douglas ("Fatal Attraction") and Evan Rachel Wood ("Westworld").

programme.title: Tiger Raid
programme.desc: Two mercenaries ride a wave of pitch-black camaraderie as they travel through the desert night on their way to carry out a kidnapping in Iraq. As the raid progresses, their frenzied World turns in on itself as past misdeeds come to the surface, and violently threatening to tear them apart.

programme.title: Castle Falls
programme.desc: After decades of neglect, Castle Heights Hospital is packed with dynamite and ready to be demolished. However, no one knows that a gang leader, now in prison, hid $3 million in stolen cash inside the building. Now, three desperate parties want the money and have exactly 90 minutes to find it.

programme.title: Shark Lake
programme.desc: Action legend Dolph Lundgren goes head-to-head with a blood thirsty shark that has a resort town under siege. As bodies wash up on the lake's shore an ex-con (Lundgren) must take matters in to his own hands to protect his daughter.

programme.title: After the Storm
programme.desc: When a luxury yacht goes down in a violent storm the race is on to salvage the bounty at any cost, causing two couples to commit the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Bored in her marriage to a country doctor and stifled by life in a small town, the restless Emma Bovary (Mia Wasikowska, "Alice in Wonderland") pursues her dreams of passion and excitement, whatever they may cost. Also starring Ezra Miller ("Justice League"), Paul Giamatti ("Sideways") and Logan Marshall-Green ("The O.C.").

programme.title: Elsa & Fred
programme.desc: After losing his wife, Fred (Christopher Plummer) moves into a nearby apartment building where he meets Elsa (Shirley MacLaine). Elsa bursts into his life like a whirlwind, teaching him that time is precious and that he should enjoy life--and love--to the fullest.

programme.title: Love Sarah
programme.desc: A young woman wishes to fulfill her mother's dream of opening her own bakery in Notting Hill, London.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: The first film in the TWILIGHT franchise. Two hearts, two fates and two worlds – human and vampire – collide when Bella (Kristen Stewart) and Edward (Robert Pattinson) fall in love.

programme.title: Christmas in Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Ellie works at a bakery, whose CEO sends his son there to learn the business.

programme.title: The Town Christmas Forgot
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. An upscale, urban family gets stranded in a remote lumber town before Christmas.

programme.title: A Family Christmas Gift
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Amber spends the holidays with her Aunt Dora and helps plan a Christmas Concert.

programme.title: Every Christmas Has A Story
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A TV personality is invited to the Most Christmas-y town in the US.

programme.title: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: Ann Pettway (Aunjanue Ellis) kidnaps an infant from a New York hospital and raises the child as her own daughter.

programme.title: Abducted Off the Street: The Carlesha Gaither Story
programme.desc: Carlesha Freeland-Gaither gets abducted by a homicidal predator while walking home from a family gathering. Determined to survive and outsmart her captor, she leaves clues behind at every opportunity, while her mother stops at nothing to find her.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie: Teens Gone Wild
programme.desc: A woman has a sexual relationship with her son's friend a girl's life becomes hell after sharing a naked photo of herself.

programme.title: Buying Back My Daughter
programme.desc: A couple organize a widespread search party when their 16-year-old daughter mysteriously disappears. When they discover she's for sale on an online escort ad, they try to buy her back to rescue her from the trafficker who abducted her.

programme.title: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: Ann Pettway (Aunjanue Ellis) kidnaps an infant from a New York hospital and raises the child as her own daughter.

programme.title: Why Did I Get Married?
programme.desc: Eight married friends take their annual reunion vacation in the Colorado mountains. Revelations of infidelity involving one pair shatter the amicable mood, forcing the remaining friends to take a hard look at the strength of their own marriages. The couples grapple with issues of commitment, love, betrayal and forgiveness as they try to move on with their lives.

programme.title: Why Did I Get Married Too?
programme.desc: In the Bahamas for their annual reunion, four couples are eager to share news about their lives over the past year. But when one's ex-husband arrives to break up her marriage and win her back, the others realize they are not immune to the challenges of love and fidelity.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Good Deeds
programme.desc: For all his life, wealthy businessman Wesley Deeds (Tyler Perry) has done what's expected of him and has settled into a predictable routine. His life begins to change, however, when he meets Lindsey Wakefield (Thandie Newton), a struggling single mother who has just been evicted. Wesley offers to help Lindsey get back on her feet and, though he's already engaged, romantic sparks begin to fly. Suddenly, Wesley finds himself torn between what is expected of him and what he really wants.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's the Family That Preys
programme.desc: Despite their differences in social class, Charlotte (Kathy Bates) and Alice (Alfre Woodard) are good friends for many years. Then secrets, greed and scandal surrounding both their families throw the women's lives into turmoil. Charlotte and Alice set out on a road trip across the country, hoping to gain perspective and save the situation from ruin.

programme.title: The Boxtrolls
programme.desc: When evil Archibald Snatcher decides to capture the Boxtrolls – lovable, box-wearing creatures – it's up to Eggs and his friend Winnie to same them.

programme.title: ParaNorman
programme.desc: Norman Babcock finds his paranormal abilities pushed to their limits to take on zombies and ghosts, and save his town from a centuries-old curse.

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: A comet is hurtling toward Earth and could mean the end of all human life. The U.S. government keeps the crisis under wraps, but crack reporter Jenny Lerner (Tea Leoni) uncovers the truth -- forcing U.S. President Beck (Morgan Freeman) to announce his plan. Grizzled astronaut Spurgeon "Fish" Tanner (Robert Duvall) and his team will land on the comet and lay explosives, hopefully deterring the object from its doomsday course. If not, humanity will have to prepare for the worst.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: On the run from a bank robbery that left several police officers dead, Seth Gecko (George Clooney) and his paranoid, loose-cannon brother, Richard (Quentin Tarantino), hightail it to the Mexican border. Kidnapping preacher Jacob Fuller (Harvey Keitel) and his kids, the criminals sneak across the border in the family's RV and hole up in a topless bar. Unfortunately, the bar also happens to be home base for a gang of vampires, and the brothers and their hostages have to fight their way out.

programme.title: The Time Machine
programme.desc: Scientist and inventor Alexander Hartdegen (Guy Pearce) is determined to prove that time travel is possible. His determination is turned to desperation by a personal tragedy that now drives him to want to change the past. Testing his theories with a time machine of his own invention, Hartdegen is hurtled 800,000 years into the future, where he discovers that mankind has divided into the hunter ... and the hunted.

programme.title: Annihilation
programme.desc: Lena, a biologist and former soldier, joins a mission to uncover what happened to her husband inside Area X -- a sinister and mysterious phenomenon that is expanding across the American coastline. Once inside, the expedition discovers a world of mutated landscapes and creatures, as dangerous as it is beautiful, that threatens both their lives and their sanity.

programme.title: Blind Date
programme.desc: When bachelor Walter Davis (Bruce Willis) is set up with his sister-in-law's pretty cousin, Nadia Gates (Kim Basinger), a seemingly average blind date turns into a chaotic night on the town. Walter's brother, Ted (Phil Hartman), tells him not to let Nadia drink alcohol, but he dismisses the warning, and her behavior gets increasingly wild. Walter and Nadia's numerous incidents are made even worse as her former lover David (John Larroquette) relentlessly follows them around town.

programme.title: Sunset
programme.desc: Having retired from a life of gunfights and peacekeeping, the great Wyatt Earp (James Garner) has landed a job as adviser to a Western movie about himself. On the set of the silent picture, he gets to know Tom Mix (Bruce Willis), an actor who specializes in Westerns, who has been hired to portray Earp. Not long after making each others' acquaintance, they find out that Earp's ex-girlfriend's son is missing, and the man responsible may be studio chief Alfie Alperin (Malcolm McDowell).

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: Carl Anderson (Liam Neeson), a deaf, mute and homeless war veteran, is arrested for the murder of a prominent judge's secretary. But Kathleen Riley (Cher), Anderson's lawyer, believes her client is innocent. She sets out to track down the real killer, and, as the trial proceeds, makes an unlikely ally in Eddie Sanger (Dennis Quaid), a jury member. When they aren't in court, the two investigate the case and manage to uncover a massive conspiracy.

programme.title: The Admirable Crichton
programme.desc: A butler becomes a king after a shipwreck.

programme.title: The War Lover
programme.desc: In World War II, American bomber pilots Capt. Buzz Rickson (Steve McQueen) and 1st Lt. Ed Boland (Robert Wagner) are stationed at a military base in England. Buzz is a hotshot pilot who consistently demonstrates great bravery -- if not outright cockiness -- in air combat. Ed, on the other hand, is more cautious in his approach and looks up to Buzz as the superior pilot. When both pilots fall for the same girl, Daphne Caldwell (Shirley Anne Field), their comradeship begins to fall apart.

programme.title: Hot Blood
programme.desc: A Gypsy king (Luther Adler) tricks his brother (Cornel Wilde) in Los Angeles into marrying a Roma bride (Jane Russell) that he bought.

programme.title: It Should Happen to You
programme.desc: After two years of failing to make it big in New York City, small-town model and actress Gladys Glover (Judy Holliday) takes a gamble by investing in billboard advertising to get her name out there. Almost immediately her risk pays off, and she finds herself inundated with media requests and fans, including the affections of the wealthy Evan Adams III (Peter Lawford) of the Adams Soap company. While Glover enjoys the spotlight, her boyfriend (Jack Lemmon) is less pleased about it.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating the Syndicate - an International rogue organization as highly skilled as they are, committed to destroying the IMF.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt and his elite team go underground after a bombing implicates them as terrorists. While trying to clear their name, the team uncovers a plot to start a nuclear war.

programme.title: Scoot and Kassie's Christmas Adventure
programme.desc: Kassie rescues a retired, wounded police dog and names him Scoot. She and her friends organize a charity concert to raise money for less-fortunate kids, and Scoot has to save the day when two crooks make plans to steal the donated money.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: A comedy-drama starring Hugh Grant as Will, a rich, child-free and irresponsible Londoner in his thirties who, in search of available women, invents an imaginary son and starts attending single parent meetings. As a result of one of his liaisons, he meets Marcus, an odd 12-year-old boy with problems at school. Gradually, Will and Marcus become friends, and as Will teaches Marcus how to be a cool kid, Marcus helps Will to finally grow up.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Nine intertwined journeys examine the complexities of the one emotion that connects all individuals, love. Among these individuals is David, the handsome, newly elected British prime minister who falls for a junior staffer. Sarah is a graphic designer whose devotion to her mentally ill brother complicates her love life. Harry, a married man, is tempted by his attractive new secretary.

programme.title: The Family Man
programme.desc: Jack's lavish, fast-paced lifestyle changes one Christmas night when he stumbles into a grocery store holdup and disarms the gunman. The next morning he wakes up in bed lying next to Kate, his college sweetheart he left in order to pursue his career, and to the horrifying discovery that his former life no longer exists. As he stumbles through this alternate suburban universe, Jack finds himself at a crossroad where he must choose between his high-power career and the woman he loves.

programme.title: Christmas Survival
programme.desc: Sisters, Miranda (Gemma Whelan, "Game of Thrones") and Lyla (Joely Richardson) come together for Christmas in this heart-warming holiday comedy. However, ancient sibling rivalries flare-up to sabotage the hope for a season of good will.

programme.title: I'll Be Homeless For Christmas
programme.desc: When a petty thief learns that his latest mark is a struggling single mother who works at a homeless shelter, he decides to use his savvy street smarts to make this Christmas one to remember for her and her young son.

programme.title: Already Tomorrow in Hong Kong
programme.desc: Ruby (Jamie Chung) and Josh (Bryan Greenberg) spent an unforgettable night together in Hong Kong a year ago, and now their brief encounter is about to get a second chance.

programme.title: Mercy Christmas
programme.desc: When Michael Briskett meets the perfect woman, his ideal Christmas dream comes true when she invites him to her family's holiday celebration. Dreams shattered, Michael struggles to survive once he realizes HE will be Christmas dinner.

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas
programme.desc: London becomes faced with a diagnosis of prostate cancer which forces him to rethink his total outlook on life during the Christmas holiday.

programme.title: Snowman's Pass
programme.desc: Impresario aids fiancée in search for her fallen climber, masking his true goal: finding a spy satellite.

programme.title: Just for Showmance
programme.desc: Tara marries Joe, a stranger as part of a TV show, but soon starts to fall for him after all.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: The Wedding in the Hamptons
programme.desc: A designer debuts at a Hamptons wedding and is mistaken for a socialite and falls for a groomsman.

programme.title: A Town Called Love
programme.desc: After clashing with the mayor of Love's son Riley, she impersonates her boss to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: What A Man Wants
programme.desc: A middle-aged womanizer pushes his strait-laced brother-in-law into having some fun but somehow ends up competing with him for the same girl.

programme.title: Happy Together
programme.desc: A lonely mother, Jung-im unknowingly spends the night with her daughter, Eugene's boyfriend at a club.

programme.title: Where Would You Like To Go?
programme.desc: A drowning sends one woman abroad and another to a hospital—tied by grief, parted by silence.

programme.title: Possessed
programme.desc: Hee-jin's sister vanishes, leading to a string of mysterious deaths in their neighborhood related to her.

programme.title: Through Sickness and Hell
programme.desc: When a police officer is trapped in a toxic marriage, he must find the strength to break free from his abusive wife, risking his career, reputation, but also his life as he battles the damaging stigma surrounding domestic violence against men.

programme.title: Bruised
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Kayla Brown discovers that her perfect husband isn't who she thought he was. Fearing for her life, she must do the unthinkable to end her nightmarish marriage.

programme.title: Bruised 2
programme.desc: Two years after the death of her husband, Kayla Brown has rebuilt her life following the launch of her successful memoir. she is then visited by a stalker, who is hell-bent on making her pay for what she has done in order to escape her husband.

programme.title: Glistening in the Snow
programme.desc: When struggling club owner Anaja finds out that her co-owner, Donovan, is coming to town for the holiday, she expects him to help keep the doors open. However, his fiancé Addie wants him to sell the club. When the owners and staff are trapped in the club during a snow storm, they will have to work together to resolve their issues with each other.

programme.title: Tulsa
programme.desc: Stuart Heisler's film is set during the 20s Oklahoma oil boom. Cherokee Lansing, daughter of a rancher killed by the oilmen, is determined to get her revenge by finding oil before they can. Helped by native American Jim Redbird and roustabout Brad Brady she strikes it rich, but her greed sees her and oilman Bruce Tanner become partners.

programme.title: The Stranger Wore a Gun
programme.desc: A man whose life was saved by an outlaw shows his gratitude by reluctantly assisting in a stagecoach robbery.

programme.title: Terror Trail
programme.desc: The Durango Kid (Charles Starrett) heads off a range war over cattle and sheep.

programme.title: Three Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a small western community turn on Jim Guthrie (Dana Andrews) when he becomes the prime suspect for a murder he didn't commit. Before getting a chance to prove his innocence, Jim is driven from his home and into the wilderness, where he is left for dead. Despite the danger, he comes back years later, discovering that he's still a wanted man. But a kindhearted local named Chris (Dianne Foster) believes his story, and together they begin a desperate search for the true culprit.

programme.title: Gun Fury
programme.desc: California-bound rancher Ben Warren (Rock Hudson) is shot and left for dead when a demented ex-Confederate, Frank Slayton (Phil Carey), kidnaps his Southern bride-to-be (Donna Reed). Revived, Ben sets out to rescue her. Along the way, he picks up Jess Burgess (Leo Gordon), a slighted former member of Slayton's gang, and American Indian local Johash (Pat Hogan), who has his own beef with the outlaws. Together they embark on a perilous chase toward the Mexican border to stop Slayton.

programme.title: Buffalo Bill and the Indians
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill has fought Indians & Civil War battles, but nothing can prepare him for show business! When he signs Sitting Bull for a role in his Wild West Show, the clash of cultures reverberates far beyond the boundaries of their sprawling theater.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: Two brothers, find themselves on opposite sides of the law in a range war. Caught in the middle is the pair's younger brother Jeff.

programme.title: Sam Whiskey

programme.desc: Vigilantes disagree on whether to try to lynch a man accused of robbing Dion Patrick.

programme.desc: Lidia prepares hot meal for a cold day. A main course of Apple Cider Braised Pork Shoulder with turnips, a comforting side of Mashed Potatoes and Fava Beans, and to finish, a decadent Pear Crumble with brandy and cherries.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia prepares Halibut Baked with Mushrooms in a lemon and white wine sauce, Savory Stuffed Peppers with capers and anchovies, and deliciously golden Anise Cookies for dessert.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Join Lidia as she makes a quick and easy Tomato and Ricotta Crostini. A Tuna Salad with Boiled Zucchini, and take comfort with Eggplant and Rice Parmigiana.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia prepares a rich Meatball and Eggplant Tagliatelle, an easy Vegetable and Meat Casserole, and a rustic Lentil Country Salad.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde brings the heat when it comes to making perfect pork dishes including a root beer glazed pork banh mi, chorizo fried rice, Filipino sausage stuffed long hot peppers, and round it all out with a spicy grilled pineapple sundae.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde kicks the summer off right with a burger blowout featuring Brisket Burgers with Grilled Onions and Blue Cheese, Shrimp Burgers with XO Sauce and a Fried Egg, and Lamb Sliders with Feta Ranch and don't forget the Lemon Oregano Fries.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: It's 4th of July and Chef Dale is ready to celebrate by grilling up his takes on summer bbq classics, like his galbi smash double cheeseburger with kimchi special sauce, honey butter steak fries, and char sui bbq ribs.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale kicks up the heat with his angry chicken, a spicy, spatchcocked and grilled whole chicken, and his kung pao chicken wings.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: It's Pizza Time! Chef Dale Talde grills up amazing pizzas for every palate including a Detroit Style Pie, a Cheddar Naan Pie with a Spiced Chick Peas & Potatoes, and gives your childhood favorite French Bread Pizza a much needed upgrade.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Dale fires up the tandoor grill, turning out juicy chicken thighs, smoky shrimp with Old Bay yogurt, crispy cauliflower, and a silky mango lassi dessert topped with crunchy candied pistachios. Tandoori done right!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Dale's turning up the heat! Carolina Reaper wings hotter than your ex, sweet-chili NY strip steak, smoky grilled chipotle Texas toast, and ancho-gochujang pineapple skillet cake for dessert. Bring some water!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale is flipping burgers into art - gooey mac & cheese burgers, fancy French patties topped with melty bucheron cheese, crispy parm-truffle fries, and peanut butter fudge ice cream sandwiches. Get hungry.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Ribs are a lifestyle, and Chef Dale's living it up with smoky beef shorties in tangy red wine glaze, Miami-style pork ribs dripping in bacon-guava BBQ, spicy baked beans, and killer key lime caramel cones. Grab some napkins!

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen

programme.sub-title: Boar Ribs and Shrimp and Grits

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas desert.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzanova on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean

programme.title: The Truman Show
programme.desc: He doesn't know it, but everything in Truman Burbank's (Jim Carrey) life is part of a massive TV set. Executive producer Christof (Ed Harris) orchestrates "The Truman Show," a live broadcast of Truman's every move captured by hidden cameras. Cristof tries to control Truman's mind, even removing his true love, Sylvia (Natascha McElhone), from the show and replacing her with Meryl (Laura Linney). As Truman gradually discovers the truth, however, he must decide whether to act on it.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: After their friend Billy (Anthony Starr) dies, Tom (Dax Shepard), Jerry (Matthew Lillard) and Dan (Seth Green) go on a camping trip to honor his memory. The campsite, however, has special significance. Billy believed famous airplane hijacker D.B. Cooper hid money in the area, and his friends aim to find it. Unfortunately, they are not prepared for the adventure. After falling over a waterfall, they are left to the mercy of wild animals and a harsh wilderness terrain.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop

He checks in with old friend Jenny Summers (Lisa Eilbacher) and starts to believe her boss, art dealer Victor Maitland (Steven Berkoff), might somehow be involved in the murder. However, Lt. Bogomil (Ronny Cox) of the Beverly Hills Police Department does not trust Foley, and hinders his search for evidence.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Bob Hearts Abishola Bob, a middle-aged compression sock businessman from Detroit, unexpectedly falls for his cardiac nurse while recovering from a heart attack and sets his sights on winning her over. Undaunted by Abishola's lack of initial interest or the vast differences in their backgrounds -- she's originally from Nigeria -- Bob is determined to win Abishola's heart in this comedic examination of immigrant life in America. From award-winning creator, executive producer and writer Chuck Lorre.

programme.desc: Reno's journey began at the Punchline Comedy Club in Atlanta, GA where he tended bar to supplement his day job. He found himself on stage during the weekly open mic night. His unique outlook on life - mixed with a six-pack, was instantly popular.

programme.title: Matt Bergman
programme.desc: Matt Bergman talks about being bad at handhsakes, accidentally breaking into an elderly woman's house, and bombing as an opener for the Goo Goo Dolls with sharp and self-deprecating humor.

programme.title: Steve Hofstetter: A Trip to Japan
programme.desc: Often called the "hardest working man in show-business", Steve Hofstetter covers everything from paper decapitations in plane crashes to seeing-eye children.

programme.title: Chad Thornsberry
programme.desc: Chad Thornsberry was born in St. Louis, MO. From an early age he learned his family was blessed, and blessed him with humor, quick wit, and a love of storytelling. Chad's unique comedic perspective awards audience the opportunity to laugh at the common occurrences in everyday life. Often referred to as a great writer, his straightforward style allows audiences to laugh with him and at him as they find the humor in themselves. With reflections on growing up in a trailer park and observations as an English teacher, Chad's satiric insights look at the pitfalls that make us human. With smart humor and a conversational style, Chad has delighted audiences from the trailer park, throughout the Midwest, and from coast to coast.

programme.title: Chris Schlichting: Catch and Dress a Squirrel
programme.desc: Chris Schlichting, an Iowan with every bone in his body still intact, comes with a few crucial warnings. Beware of birthday wishes, day raccoons, and the spelling on all hand written love letters.

programme.title: Jesse Egan
programme.desc: San Diego native Jesse Egan jokes about hitting on women in a smart car, hippie drive-bys, and the gluten free craze.

programme.title: Andy Beningo
programme.desc: Over the past decade, Andy Beningo has established himself as one of the hardest working comedians in the business. Performing his clever, "every man" material has led to some 2,700 career performances. Along the way, he has appeared on AXS Gotham Comedy Live, as a final four finalist on CMT's Next Big Comic, and on the Bob and Tom radio show. Beningo's new CD regularly plays on Laugh USA on XM Sirius Radio. He's been hailed for his clean comedy, and was named one of the 40 Best Up and Coming Comedians in the country. He was also named "Best Comedian" by both the Detroit Metro Times and Detroit Hour magazine.

programme.title: James Johann
programme.desc: James' childhood upbringing was significantly influenced by country music, countless bad hair cuts, and Catholic school. In 1991, James began his stand-up career in Kansas City. Today, James is a long-time veteran of the stand-up comedy circuit, performing at clubs across the country. His self-deprecating sense of humor and high energy style come together to create a unique onstage persona. James relies more on his brain than the profane and his comedy is a truthful and hilarious reflection of life as he sees it.

programme.title: Collin Moulton
programme.desc: Collin is one of the most fun, personable, and sought after headliners today. He has had his own stand-up special on SHOWTIME, he's been on NICKELODEON, and was recently featured on LAST CALL WITH CARSON DALY. Touring for over 15 years Collin has gained an ease and enjoyment on stage that makes every show worth watching.America knows and loves him. His familiarity and energy engages and relieves the audience before he even speaks. His electric storytelling style makes you care about every topic he explores. Collin's comedy is the release needed from our every day lives. Come needing to laugh tonight, leave wanting to laugh forever!Collin Moulton

programme.title: Will Foskey: All Things Sacred
programme.desc: Comedian Will Foskey performs his debut comedy special at the Laughing Skull Lounge Foskey covers topics ranging from growing up in the suburban city of Woodstock, to being hit on by a 100 year old woman.

programme.title: Card Sharks
programme.desc: This show from legendary Mark Goodson-Bill Todman Productions features two contestants trying to predict answers to survey questions for the opportunity to play a game with oversized playing cards for a chance to win cash. One contestant guesses how many people (out of 100) gave a certain answer to a question and the other contestant then guesses if the number is higher or lower than the opponent's guess. The winning contestant then faces a row of cards and must determine if each succeeding card is higher or lower than the one that precedes it. The contestant who wins two out of three games wins the match and plays the bonus round, called Money Cards. The Money Cards round is similar to the card game in the main game but with three levels of cards instead of one row. The contestant is given $200 at the beginning of Money Cards and wagers any or all of that money when guessing if the cards will be higher or lower than the previous one. A perfect round could earn the contestant $28,800.

He's then visited by the patient's mistress, Brooke Reynolds (Meryl Streep), whom he quickly falls for despite her being a likely murder suspect. As the police pressure on him intensifies, Rice decides to attempt solving the case on his own and soon discovers that someone is trying to kill him as well.

programme.title: Sailor Moon

The Lodge is recognised as one of Southern Africa's most Private and Luxurious Safari Lodges and they are proudly actively engaged in ongoing Conservation efforts. A very unique and special feature is the Whiskey and Gin Bar at the secret Hideout where you can enjoy the magnificence of Wildlife only a few feet away from you around the Lodge's waterhole.

It offers a unique and bespoke Luxury Tented Safari experience with abundant Wildlife encounters and even a River Safari.

KAPAMA, meaning ‘place of peace', is an ultra-luxurious and prestigious Lodge that exudes calmness and depicts the pinnacle of elegant Safari accommodation, with wraparound views of the African bush enhancing the overall sense of tranquillity. A special Safari experience is the Romantic Sleep-out Platform where Guests can sleep under the Stars on a raised platform in the middle of the African plains.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Weather of 2005
programme.desc: 2005 saw some of the wildest weather in the history of the planet. Host/adventurer George Kourounis tracks twisters through the Tornado Alley of Oklahoma and Texas, descends into the Erte Ale Volcano in the Danakil Depression of Ethiopia (the world's hottest place), and then witnesses Hurricane Katrina destroying the town of Gulfport, Mississippi, from a steel-reinforced bunker facing the debris-strewn beachfront.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Blizzard
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the world's worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet – 231 miles per hour – was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a “human popsicle”, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Council's high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Water
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the world's biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Boiling Lake
programme.desc: Dominica, the most volcanic and mountainous island in the Caribbean, is home to the Boiling Lake, a large waterfall-fed lake of furiously boiling water. Adventurer George Kourounis becomes the first person ever to traverse across the lake on a rope, risking his life to take water samples and shoot video from a place no human has ever been. He then dives to the ocean floor off the coast of the island to explore vents where the superheated water bubbles into the ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Avalanche
programme.desc: Avalanche danger is very high in the Rogers Pass area of the Trans Canada Highway in British Columbia. Host of Angry Planet George Kourounis travels with a variety of experts to bring down huge avalanches in the Rocky Mountains. Ski Patrollers throw hand charges to clear the slopes, the British Columbia Department of Highways uses helicopter bombing and mountaintop mortars to keep the roads safe, and the Canadian Armed Forces fire 105mm howitzers at the mountains to bring down the dangerous snow. Still, there are accidents and fatalities in the mountains. We meet Francois Desroisers, an avalanche burial victim who tells a terrible and tragic tale of a mountain disaster.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fin del Mundo
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest weather on the planet can be experienced at the southern tip of Argentina and Chile– the area the South Americans call the “Fin del Mundo” – the end of the world. Host George Kourounis travels to Ushuaia, Argentina, sails south on the expedition sailboat “Northanger” to round infamous Cape Horn, then climbs the spectacular but rapidly melting glaciers along the Beagle Channel.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena – but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Heartache & Hope
programme.desc: It's an ordinary town with a history of heartache. No one knows why Moore, Oklahoma has been the target of 3 mega-tornadoes in just 16 years. On the heels of the May 20, 2013 EF5 tornado, Mark & Jaclyn uncover stories behind the disaster, the recovery and the tenacious spirit of the people of the US Midwest.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Uphill Battle
programme.desc: A mysterious fever overwhelms Mark as he struggles to fulfil a childhood dream. He must use every ounce of inner strength to journey to the mouth of hell, and make it out alive.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Best of
programme.desc: From hailstorms to hurricanes and tornadoes, the Storm Hunters revisit their craziest chases and share some of the most amazing moments in extreme weather events.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Relentless Winter
programme.desc: Mark & Jaclyn chase extreme winter weather as Nor'easters with hurricane force wind gusts and record snowfalls hammer Atlantic Canada.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury
programme.desc: On only her second trip storm chasing, meteorologist Jaclyn Whittal joins Mark Robinson in a shocking and gut-wrenching ride through the US Midwest during the most prolific and dangerous tornado season on record.

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Kipper

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn about Classical Music
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland's one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: There's someone...or something strange in the neighborhood and the kids imagine the worst - but Strawberry finds it's a new girl, Blueberry Muffin.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: After an accidental wager with Purple Pieman, Strawberry sets off to prove that she can go around the world in 80 days.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance - and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: The Littlest Berrykin
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, “The Littlest Berrykin,” into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics. But before leaving, they must choose which of their three princesses (played by Lemon, Raspberry and Strawberry in royal gowns) will rule the kingdom.

programme.title: The Berry Big Relay Race
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the “retrieve” part of the activity—as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search. Orange finds Strawberry, Plum and Raspberry in Lemon's salon, getting their hair and nails done, but something starts going terribly wrong with the appliances.

programme.title: The Broken Wheel
programme.desc: But now the wheel won't spin, and Sid wonders how exactly wheels work? At school, Sid explores how wheels are simple machines that help move all kinds of things like cars, trains, tricycles, and even toy trucks!

programme.title: Blippi's Holiday Special 2022
programme.desc: Blippi and Meekah follow a holiday treasure map and do some fun winter activities.

programme.title: The Berry Best Treasure
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control—life in Berry Bitty City is impossible! Strawberry rallies their spirits by suggesting a fun way for them to spend the day out of town: a treasure hunt! She describes a game where the girls divide into two teams, and each team creates fun written clues for the other that lead to funny objects the girls must collect.

programme.title: The Berry Scary Fun Adventure
programme.desc: With the power completely out in Berry Bitty City, the girls go on a camping trip to be out of the way of the Berrykin work crews. Lemon is nervous because she believes there is a creepy creature in the forest (that she read about in a book Blueberry loaned her), and the girls get the nervous bug, but Strawberry turns their apprehension into fun by daring her friends to stay out in the woods the longest! Rallied by a sense of competition and adventure, the girls divide into three groups and set up tents—each convinced they will be the bravest group. They each come up with diverting activities to distract themselves.

programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.sub-title: Ruby's Ranger Adventure // The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. programme.title: Jenny's Magic Shop

The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.

Tow truck help other cars, when they are broken down. Watch new car cartoon and learn about helper cars!

With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Mya Go is a preschool animated show about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her. Set in the bustling town of Everyday, Mya Go lives here with the Go family and lives nearby her closest friends.

programme.title: Robocar Poli
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Pins and Nettie
programme.desc: Pins and Nettie are besties and there is nothing they like more than going on adventures together, most of time.

programme.title: Super Car
programme.desc: The Super Car Series is a brand-new children's musical animation short film created by the BarryTiger brand, designed to introduce kids to different vehicles. Tailored for preschool children aged 0-8, the series uses an original musical format, allowing kids to learn about various common cars and machinery through engaging songs. Beyond vehicle recognition, it also fosters values of respect, kindness, and teamwork. The story takes place in a town where humans and cars coexist, with fourteen Super Cars working together to protect the city, resolve everyday challenges, and combat disasters caused by villains.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Every kids loves Head Shoulders Knees and Toes, Old MacDonlad had a Farm & all the nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Learn colors with the Colors Song and tap your feet to the fun beats of Dance Song and much more!

programme.title: Rise and Shine
programme.desc: Take a musical trip every morning with Down by the Bay, Outside my window I see, Car Song and more!

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Here are the forever loved classics like Johny Johny Yes Papa, Wheels On The Bus and more!

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: A delightful collection of classic nursery rhymes that takes children on a charming adventure and spark imagination.

programme.title: Non Stop Hits

programme.title: Non Stop Hits

programme.title: Soothing Melodies
programme.desc: Step into a world of Soothing Melodies like Hey Diddle Diddle, Hush Little Baby, and more!

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: Four curious young dinosaurs named Rocky, Bill, Tiny, and Mazu go on adventures while following their herd. Rocky is the courageous one, Bill is the most timid, Tiny is the smallest yet most playful, and Mazu is the most inquisitive. The four friends look at things such as mapping the stars and searching for flowers but most importantly, they are asserting their independence and learning to do things away from the safety of the herd.

programme.title: Friends Reunite
programme.desc: Olly about how his obsession is affecting their relationships. Olly refuses to see the damage he's causing, but it becomes clear that he's lost touch with what really matters.

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel's Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen CHI. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of CHIMA have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof ” way to get CHI to the tribes.

programme.title: Symptoms!
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes
programme.desc: The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. Getting out with it alive past Boss Ember and his Scrap Force is nearly impossible.

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Slugterra

The sinister Emperor's henchmen have pillaged every cavern of its slugs, and without the slugs' energy, the Eastern Caverns have fallen into ruins. The stolen slugs are locked away in the heart of the Emperor's evil dominion, the imperial palace.

programme.title: Una boda perfecta
programme.desc: Con la ayuda de sus mejores amigos, una pareja planea la boda de sus sueños en el mismo lugar donde comenzó su romance.

programme.title: Siempre en San Valentín
programme.desc: Una bloguera con mala suerte piensa que ha cambiado la racha el Día de San Valentín cuando se encuentra con un veterinario muy guapo, pero ella descubre que él es el que ha estado dejando comentarios groseros sobre sus artículos.

programme.title: Regreso a casa en Navidad
programme.desc: Jim es un sargento mayor del Ejército estadounidense que regresa herido de Afganistán y alquila una casa a Amanda, viuda de otro militar que después de dos años aún no ha superado la muerte de su marido.

programme.title: Sweeter Than Chocolate
programme.desc: Un reportero de televisión investiga el rumor que afirma que una chocolatera tiene la receta para encontrar el amor verdadero en el Día de San Valentín.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Edgewater, Florida
programme.desc: Hilarie Burton Morgan, defensora de los derechos humanos, investiga diferentes casos de asesinato ocurridos en pequeños y aislados pueblos de Estados Unidos, mientras registra el modo en que cada crimen afecta enormemente la vida en esas comunidades.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: Un hombre de Arizona afirma que los ladrones de joyas mataron a su esposa, pero su historia se desvela casi de inmediato. Sin embargo, su defensa temporal por locura demuestra ser un oponente formidable en la corte.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: La policía cree que ha resuelto una muerte misteriosa en Florida, pero en el juicio el caso da un giro impactante, y un caso aparentemente sencillo de asesinato por estrangulamiento se convierte en una extraña historia de crimen.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: Un hombre con una historia violenta va a prisión después de estar a punto de matar a su novia. Momentos después de quedar libre en libertad condicional, se encuentra involucrado en otro caso trágico.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: Dos desconocidos se encuentran en un bar, pero su velada termina en una muerte aterradora. Aunque la policía sospecha del culpable, quedan desconcertados cuando surgen dudas sobre el motivo del crimen.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: Una mujer escapa de las garras de un asesino en serie de Nueva Jersey. Las amigas y familia de otra víctima ponen una trampa para entregar al asesino a la policía.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: Dos mujeres mayores de Los Ángeles parecen haber cometido el asesinato perfecto, pero cuando lo intentan repetir seis años después, las cosas no salen como lo planearon.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: En Palm Bay, Florida, un hombre supuestamente inocente es declarado culpable de asesinato y sentenciado a cadena perpetua. La prueba más contundente que hay en su contra proviene de un método de ciencia forense que se ha desmentido.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: Uno de los casos más famosos de la historia moderna concluye con un veredicto que conmociona al país. Se cuestiona quién es el responsable y el papel que jugaron los consultores del juicio y los medios en el resultado.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: Una mujer de Florida es condenada a 20 años de cárcel por disparar una bala de advertencia y se le niega una defensa controvertida. Se analiza lo que hizo mal y para quién están diseñadas las leyes de defensa propia.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: Una mujer de Wisconsin va al hospital para confirmar su embarazo y ser atendida, pero termina siendo una pesadilla: queda cautiva durante varios días, se le niega un abogado y es enviada a la cárcel.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: Una mujer de California que asegura haber actuado en defensa propia termina en la cárcel por homicidio. Ahí, se da cuenta de que su historia es mucho más común de lo que creía.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: Un hombre de California es condenado a la muerte por cometer un cruel asesinato doble. A pesar de recibir un castigo severo, el sistema fallido de la condena a muerte hace a todos sentir que no hubo justicia.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Adel, Georgia
programme.desc: La ciudad de Adel, Georgia, es sacudida por un brutal homicidio por robo, y los lugareños rápidamente señalan a un forastero como el asesino.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Sauquoit, New York
programme.desc: Cuando una querida quiropráctica en Sauquoit, Nueva York, muere repentinamente en circunstancias extrañas, los investigadores descubren que fue asesinada con un veneno poco común. El asesino solo podía ser alguien a quien ella conocía de cerca.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos: Manotas
programme.desc: Ignacio intenta interrogar al Manotas, pero la rabia se lo impide, y lo mata. Comienza a vengarse de todos los que participaron en la muerte de su padre. Victoria gana las elecciones.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Irene le pide perdón a Verónica y horas más tarde recibe una carta de Gabriela donde dice: "te perdono". Rodrigo sabe que Villegas pagará por el daño cometido. Guerra prepara una coartada.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Irene le pide perdón a Gabriela y se ofrece para atestiguar en contra de Antonia. Lagarto también podría ser un testigo clave. Ricardo hace el amor con Inés y les toman fotografías.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: La fiesta de cumpleaños de Charlie es un evento al que Eliza lleva pasteles y ve a Max después de 10 años. Sofía es víctima de un fatal accidente, justo cuando le iban a cambiar la sentencia.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Todos la dan por muerta, pero Sofía rescata niñas de la trata y Joel la encuentra. Eliza descubre todo sobre Max y él, sin justificación, por bígamo, dice que es la única a quien ha querido.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: El reencuentro de Eliza y Max los separa, cuando él saca cuentas de la edad de Rodrigo y recuerda que vio a su mujer con Andrés. Joel no puede creer que la asesina de Irene esté viva y libre.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso
programme.desc: Catalina se mete en la boca del lobo al entrar en la finca de la Diabla para encontrar a Nachito.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso
programme.desc: A la Diabla no le queda otra solución que aceptar la relación de Daniela con Nachito y permite que él se vaya a vivir en su propia casa. Marcial quiere la libertad de Aurelio Jaramillo.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Sea infiel, use condón Escándalo, basura y anarquía
programme.desc: Para demostrar que cualquier persona puede ser infiel, Melisa contrata a Victoria. Kalan, que vive como un vagabundo, le regala a su amigo Diego un local en Nueva York a cambio de dejarlo dormir atrás.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Katy es madre, pero su suegra la acusa de ser pandillera y quiere la custodia del niño. Sara y su esposo adoptaron a Mariana, pero su padre biológico salió de la cárcel y Sara desea que se vaya con él.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Joseph sufrió acoso de sus compañeros de universidad y decidió vengarse de Hiverson. Para tener un hijo, Patricia y su pareja Yoan acuerdan que Yoan tenga relaciones con la hija de Patricia.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Todo por mi hija Asalto sexual en vivo
programme.desc: Jazmín está descuidando su casa y su aspecto físico por ahorrar dinero para la universidad de su hija Katerine. Magalí es actriz y, en un casting, Romeo le pide que se desnude y se masturbe.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Llamada de Dios a volar Amor a las patadas
programme.desc: Yanni reclama su herencia para unirse a las Monjas del Monte, una congregación dedicada a cultivar cannabis. Rebeca sabe que su hermana es maltratada por su esposo, pero no lo quiere reconocer.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Tercera de nadie Fotos de forense
programme.desc: Luciana es la esposa de Ricky G., un cantante merenguero, pero desde que se separó no tiene producciones. Además, Macaria trabaja en un departamento forense y publica fotos escalofriantes.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Es mi castigo Muerto en Las Vegas
programme.desc: Yanier es un violador que no calificó para la castración en la cárcel y quiere pedirle a la Dra. Polo que lo deje autocastrarse. Además, Delia y su ex mantenían una casa juntos, pero él murió.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Violada por un condón Luna de hielo
programme.desc: Daniela acordó tener sexo con dos chicos con la condición de que se pusieran condón, pero ellos no cumplieron. Jonathan perdió el puente de dientes postizos en una clase de buceo y exige un pago.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Diez desafíos, un gran premio y sólo una hora para poder obtenerlo son los ingredientes de este divertido concurso conducido por Marco Antonio Regil. Cada noche los concursantes deberán completar disparatados retos en menos de 60 segundos para evitar ser eliminados. Los elementos de uso cotidiano del hogar se convierten en divertidos juegos en donde las alfombras de baño sirven como trineos, los lápices se vuelven complicados aparatos de ingeniería y las latas de refresco son obstáculos de equilibrio. Al final, tendrán que completar el reto de "La moneda millonaria y en menos de 60 segundos deben hacer que una moneda aterrice dentro de un jarro de agua localizado a 4 metros de distancia. Un ingenioso programa de concursos que mantendrá a los televidentes al filo de sus sillas.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
programme.desc: Los Héroes tienen que regresar por carretera a México. En el camino les roban la camioneta y los dejan tirados en el desierto donde son secuestrados por extraterrestres.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
