programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: De lo perdido lo que aparezca
programme.desc: Renata se vuelve adicta a una máquina tragamonedas y pierde el gasto familiar. Don Arnoldo graba a la familia mientras trata de ayudar a Plutarco para que no pierda su trabajo al viajar con el dueño de la aerolínea.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Han pasado tres meses desde la desaparición de Plutarco, y la familia cuida de que Gaby no cometa una locura. La vida del abuelo ha cambiado drásticamente y, ahora, es un gran actor de Hollywood. Los López reciben una increíble sorpresa.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Debido a sus problemas con Hacienda, don Justo decide esconderse en casa de los López. Después de una discusión, Martina se desmaya y la Nena tiene que cuidarla. Los López tendrán que dividirse entre atender a Martina y a don Justo.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Durante su visita a la farmacia, la tía Licha es confundida con una doctora y se consigue una credencial falsa para recetar medicamentos. Don Justo condiciona el regreso de Plácido a su empresa a cambio de que le deje su cama para poder dormir.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano consiguen trabajo en una estética, rodeados de bellas mujeres, pero aunque parecen estar en el paraíso, la amistad de los chicos se pondrá en riesgo, y descubrirán que las apariencias engañan.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano trabajan de cuidadores en una casa de retiro para adultos mayores, un anciano muere y ellos creen ser los responsables por lo que se las ingenian para que el muerto parezca vivo y pueda asistir a una fiesta.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vìtor y Albertano consiguen trabajo en una empresa de mudanzas, pero cargar objetos pesados y cuidar pertenencias ajenas no parece lo más indicado para los chicos.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano trabaja como maestro de yoga e inicia un romance con una atractiva y adinerada mujer madura, quien lo utiliza para vengarse de su esposo infiel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.sub-title: El amor es lo más importante
programme.desc: Miguel se pelea a golpes con Gastón por defender a Mía. Ella le pregunta a Miguel si es posible que vuelvan a estar juntos. Diego interroga a Roberta sobre su relación con Simón. Todos los alumnos celebran la boda simbólica de Lupita y Nico.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego quiere ser amigo de Roberta Miguel le pide perdón a Mia Mayra convencerá a Lupita y Nico para que no dejen el colegio Mia le ofrece a Roberta viajar a Orlando con ella y luego a Sudamérica Diego se preocupa al ver a sus padres discutir.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mabel le recuerda a Diego que lo ama Madariaga les dice a sus alumnos que los niños de Chiapas lo necesitan el señor Mendiola le exige a Gandía que reincorpore a Gastón de prefecto Mia descubre que Roberta cambió su boleto por un viaje en crucero.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Los chicos se divierten en Cuernavaca. Mía y Miguel pasan sus vacaciones juntos y se enteran de que han ganado un viaje. Tras despedirse de Nico en el aeropuerto, Lupita visita a su padre para conocer a su media hermana.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Lola rechaza a Lupita. Diego es picado por una araña gracias a Roberta que está decidida a arruinarle el día. Lupita se entera de que Dulce es también su media hermana. Mia y Miguel se van de viaje.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia hizo arreglos para tener habitaciones separadas de Miguel. Roberta le cuenta a Diego que terminó su relación con Simón. Giovanni se entera de que sus padres sufrieron un desfalco y quedaron en la ruina. Diego encuentra a León con otra mujer.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Empieza el nuevo ciclo escolar y ahora los alumnos tendrán que adaptarse a las nuevas reglas. Algunos cambios, son demasiado para ellos. Roberta, indignada, comienza una huelga.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gandía le advierte a Alma que no va a tolerar más indisciplinas de Roberta Lissete encuentra a Giovanni en su casa Roberta le dice a Lupita que Pilar otra vez las traicionó Mendiola le dice a Gandía que cursará su maestría por Internet.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Sospechas
programme.desc: Juan le explica a Sofía lo que ocurrió con Ruth. Sarita le confiesa a Óscar que alguien intentó abusar de Jimena. Jimena sospecha que Ricardo es quien intentó abusar de ella. Juan y Sofía les realizan a sus hijas una prueba de ADN.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Renata se alista para ir a "La Bonita" a reencontrarse con Jerónimo. Karina está contenta al saberse embarazada. Agustín le dice a Roberta que debe negar el affaire que tuvieron. El plan para desenmascarar a Roberta y la alianza con Fina comienzan.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Todos se preocupan por el secuestro de Renata. Renata desprecia a Agustín por haberla secuestrado. Gonzalo le pregunta a Roberta si tiene algo que ver con la desaparición de Renata.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Alfonsina le tiende una trampa a Melesio para que confiesa los crímenes de Agustín y el paradero de Renata. Aníbal logra infiltrarse en el barco de Agustín, pero es capturado y llevado ante él.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Jerónimo y Renata no pueden creer la felicidad que viven. Fine instiga a Roberta para que le preparan una fiesta de cumpleaños fastuosa. Una adivina asegura que Adriana y Matías son almas gemelas.

programme.title: Destilando amor
programme.desc: Gaviota sufre al enterarse que perdió a su bebé a causa del accidente que tuvo y le pide ayuda a la Madre Felicity para buscar a Rodrigo. Isadora le pide a Minerva organizar más encuentros con Rodrigo.

programme.title: Destilando amor
programme.desc: Isadora le confiesa a su madre que está enamorada de Rodrigo y hará cualquier cosa para conquistarlo. Agripina le dice a Rodrigo que Gaviota viajó a Europa con un fotógrafo para conseguir dinero.

programme.title: Destilando amor
programme.desc: Isadora acepta casarse con Rodrigo a pesar de que él no está enamorado de ella. Gaviota se emociona al pensar que pronto podrá regresar a la hacienda y encontrarse con Rodrigo, pero las cosas no son como ella imagina.

programme.desc: Un joven quiere comprar la cafetería de don Tomás a pesar de que éste se niega a aceptar el dinero que le ofrece.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Los niños no ocultan mentiras, ni callan verdades
programme.desc: Debido a su enfermedad, Guillermo debe ser cuidado y vigilado las 24 horas, pero su nieto sospecha que su enfermera oculta algo.

programme.sub-title: Nunca a la cama te irás sin aprender algo más

programme.desc: Un joven se reencuentra con su madre tras mucho tiempo de haber estado separados y ella lo ayudará a cambiar su terrible estilo de vida.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.desc: Una mujer pasa por el peor momento de su vida luego de ser internada en un psiquiátrico, y busca la forma de solucionarlo como ella cree que es correcto.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Biby Gaytán, María León, Albertano y Juanpa Zurita se unen a la nueva temporada y tendrán la tarea de seleccionar a los pequeños competidores. Los escuadrones quedan atrás y la competencia se vuelve individual.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los jueces se dan a la tarea de seleccionar a los últimos participantes. Los aspirantes se enfrentan en una serie de duelos donde tendrán que demostrar sus cualidades de canto y baile.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños tendrán que dar su mejor esfuerzo y demostrar su talento en el escenario, ya que cuatro cantantes, junto con cuatro bailarinas, serán eliminados en el primer duelo de la competencia.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Galilea Montijo presenta los escuadrones que participan en la competencia. Entre los jueces destacan: Bianca Marroquín, Raquel Ortega, Pierre Angelo, Noel Schajris, María José y Manuel Ibáñez. Además de contar con la presencia de Gloria Trevi.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El tiempo parece moverse en cámara lenta para familiares, amigos y conocidos de personas que han sido víctimas de diferentes crímenes que, desgraciadamente, muchas veces no logran ser resueltos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Poco a poco el ser humano termina con el planeta que habita, hoy, el plástico es uno de los mayores enemigos, no se degrada, no desaparece y ahora llena los mares, amenazando su flora y fauna sin control.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Ante la incompetencia de las autoridades, muchos familiares se han convertido en investigadores privados aficionados dispuestos a enfrentar riesgos. Ellos dicen vivir una carrera contra el tiempo para evitar que sus seres queridos desaparezcan.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una banda de asaltantes con armas de juguete se llevó casi veinte millones de dólares de las cajillas de seguridad de un banco, lo sorprendente es que no hubo heridos ni disparos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Un hombre habla sobre el infierno que vivió con la desaparición de su esposa, pues no solo sufría por ella al no saber donde estaba, también tuvo que lidiar con el hecho de que se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Frontera: las rutas de la crisis
programme.desc: Una avalancha de inmigrantes abarrota la frontera y pone a prueba la capacidad del gobierno para manejar una nueva crisis humanitaria, la tensión entre ciudades fronterizas crece.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Entre lágrimas, un niño le confiesa a su madre adoptiva que quiere volver con su familia biológica. Estrellas latinas del Cirque du Soleil hablan sobre el cambio drástico en sus vidas tras la pandemia, pues se vieron obligadas a dejar los shows.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Tras múltiples denuncias, una red de oscuros secretos y abusos a menores es descubierta. Los líderes de una iglesia se ven envueltos en terribles crímenes que tendrán que pagar en prisión.

Notably, 'CHILLER' serves as both a prequel and sequel to 'BTTF,' offering a deeper experience when listened to together.NCT DREAM's title track 'CHILLER' stands out with its experimental sound rooted in French touch, with standout electronic textures and unpredictable progressions. The lyrics playfully depict the cool and confident 'CHILLER' enjoying their brightest moments, signaling the start of a new chapter for NCT DREAM.

programme.title: SMTOWN
programme.sub-title: Comeback MVs: NCT DREAM · SUPER JUNIOR · aespa · Hearts2Hearts
programme.desc: SUPER JUNIOR showcases the 'pinnacle of style' with their title track ‘Express Mode'. Bold lyrics, a danceable sound, and an addictive chorus highlight their cool energy. Their charismatic '1 step 2 step 3 step 4' moves and explosive dance break announce the return of the 'original performance kings.' aespa's “Dirty Work” is a dance track featuring an addictive synth bass and cool vocal melodies. In the music video, the members transform into strong resistance fighters who will do any "dirty work" for each other, delivering intense yet sensual performances. Hearts2Hearts' new single ‘STYLE' is an uptempo dance track characterized by lively rhythms and a groovy bassline. The members' bright and bubbly vocals combine to deliver feel-good energy.From futuristic ambition to powerful performances and uplifting energy, dive into SMTOWN's summer comeback music videos right now. NCT DREAM presents double title tracks, ‘CHILLER' and ‘BTTF'. ‘CHILLER' features an experimental French touch sound that playfully portrays a cool "CHILLER." ‘BTTF' embodies the bold ambition of "We are the future," creating a cinematic, sci-fi atmosphere with its signature synth bass and dynamic hip-hop sound. Notably, 'CHILLER' serves as both a prequel and sequel to 'BTTF,' creating a deeper experience when listened to together.

programme.title: La Velle
programme.sub-title: Rhoda Scott & La Velle: Hammond, Soul and Blues
programme.desc: American soul and jazz organist Rhoda Scott spent most of her career in France, where she earned recognition far greater than that accorded to her in the United States. There was never any doubt about what instrument she would play as a child. "It's really the most beautiful instrument in the world,” she once stated in an interview. “The first thing I did was take my shoes off and work the pedals.” This performance at the French Festival Jazz à Vienne is extra special. Not only because of the beautiful location, but also because she shares the stage with American gospel and blues singer La Velle. Together they give an intimate and beautiful show in the antique theatre of Vienne.

programme.title: John Coltrane
programme.desc: Explore the music of one of the most influential and innovative saxophonists in jazz history: John Coltrane! Immerse yourself in this collection of remarkable performances from the early 1960s that showcase Coltrane's unparalleled artistry and unique sound during a transformative period in the artist's career. Recorded in various European cities, Coltrane is seen playing the songs “Autumn Leaves”, “Hackensack”, “My Favorite Things”, “I Want To Talk About You”, “Vigil”, and “Naima”. Tune in and experience why the music of John Coltrane has touched the lives of so many!

programme.title: John Lewis
programme.desc: Pianist John Lewis, co-founder and long-time leader of the legendary Modern Jazz Quartet, wrote jazz history with that band. His ability to blend classical forms with jazz improvisations singled him out as a unique artist, who was capable of transcending every musical barrier. When the Modern Jazz Quartet retired, John Lewis continued to work with other musicians and as a solo pianist. This program, recorded in studio conditions, features a spell-binding solo performance.

programme.title: Miles Davis
programme.desc: American trumpeter Miles Davis (1926-1991) was a pioneering jazz musician from the late 1940s to the late 1980s. His influence on 20th century music is hard to overstate, as he trailblazed bebop, cool jazz, hardbop, modal jazz, and electronic music. On October 11, 1964, Miles Davis performed at Teatro Dell'Arte in Milan. With tenor saxophonist Wayne Shorter, pianist Herbie Hancock, bassist Ron Carter and drummer Tony Williams, Davis performed Autumn Leaves, My Funny Valentine, All Blues, All of You, and Joshua.

programme.title: Anita Oday, Göran Engdahl, Roman Dylag & John Poole
programme.desc: Anita O'Day boasts two wonderful concerts from 1963 and 1970 that present the “jazz singer supreme” in impeccable form. O'Day's horn-based approach to singing is in full effect throughout both shows including stand-out renditions in each show of audience favorites “Tea For Two” and “Sweet Georgia Brown” (both reprised from her triumphant appearance at the 1958 Newport Jazz Festival.) This show is a fitting testimony to one of jazz music's true originals and shows unequivocally why she is ranked in the top tier of vocalists along with Ella Fitzgerald, Sarah Vaughan, and Billie Holiday.

programme.title: Lalah Hathaway
programme.desc: Winner of five Grammys in four consecutive years, including the Grammy for best R&B album in 2017, Lalah Hathaway is a force impossible to ignore. The American artist has shared the scene with Prince, Snoop Dogg, Stevie Wonder, Anita Baker, Mary J. Blige, Frank Ocean and many others, an irrefutable proof of her keen musical sense and enormous talent. With a 26-year career, Hathaway is still highly sought after by the biggest names in music. See her transform the 2018 Sing Jazz festival scene into a real R&B club, where she flaunts her voice and stage presence out of the ordinary.

programme.title: Maynard Ferguson
programme.sub-title: Winter 1980: Maynard Ferguson Big Band in Brussels
programme.desc: The Brussels Jazz Club was filled to the brim with both musicians and audience members when the Maynard Ferguson Big Band performed there during their Winter Tour of 1980. From the first notes of the cover of Weather Report's “Birdland” that opens the performance to the final notes of “Gonna Fly Now” that closes it, Ferguson gives his young sidemen ample time to shine. The mutual admiration shared by the leader and his sidemen makes this performance a delight to watch.

programme.title: Clark Terry
programme.sub-title: The Skymasters with Clark Terry - North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1989, Dutch big band and radio orchestra The Skymasters took flight at the North Sea Jazz Festival in the Hague. Joining them is jazz legend Clark Terry on trumpet, flugelhorn and vocals in this exciting collaboration.

programme.title: Chet Baker
programme.sub-title: I Wouldn't Give a Cripple Crab a Crutch
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential male jazz and pop vocalists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Delight in the expressive beauty and emotional depth of Chet Baker's rendition of “Time After Time” and “You Don't Know What Love Is", recorded live in Brussels, Belgium in 1964 and in Rome, Italy in 1956 respectively. Revel in Frank Sinatra's iconic version of “I've Got You Under My Skin". Immerse yourself in Dizzy Gillespie's dynamic performance of “Let Me Outta Here”, recorded live in Denmark in 1970. Enjoy Tony Bennett's unforgettable performance of “It Don't Mean A Thing (If It Ain't Got That Swing)” at London's majestic Royal Albert Hall in 1974. Let the haunting beauty of Nat King Cole's 1957 performance of “Autumn Leaves” and Louis Armstrong's performance of “Basin Street Blues” from 1959 delight you. Dean Martin's smooth vocal stylings will enthrall you as he performs the jazz standard “Wrap Your Troubles In Dreams". Witness the electrifying energy of Sammy Davis Jr.'s performance of “Too Close For Comfort”. Join us for this unforgettable musical experience that you'll surely cherish!

programme.title: Art Farmer, Jim Hall, Steve Swallow & Pete La Roca
programme.sub-title: The Art Farmer Quartet live In England
programme.desc: Art Farmer: Live in '64 highlights an amazing one-hour concert featuring the great flugelhornist in his prime. Farmer's band includes legendary guitarist Jim Hall (fresh from Sonny Rollins' band), drummer Pete LaRoca, and Steve Swallow on bass. The legendary ensemble plays both standards and originals with ease and finesse and highlights why Farmer was considered one of the most innovative horn players in all of jazz.

programme.title: Zhu Xiao-Mei
programme.desc: Chinese pianist Zhu Xiao-Mei performs J. S. Bach's Goldberg Variations (BWV 988) at the Leipzig Bach Festival. This June 2014 concert was recorded at St. Thomas Church, where Bach spent most time of his career as 'Thomaskantor', the musical director of the Thomanerchor church choir. The Goldberg Variations consist of one aria and a set of 30 variations. The work was first published in 1741 and was named after harpsichordist Johann Gottlieb Goldberg. In contrast to melodic variations on a theme, the Goldberg Variations do not follow the melody, but rather use the aria's bass line and chord progression. Every third variation in the series of 30 is a canon that follows an ascending pattern. The Goldberg Variations are among Bach's most celebrated works, which gained an even larger audience thanks to Glenn Gould's legendary recordings of the work in 1955 and 1981.

programme.title: Sergey Malov
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Evgeny Kissin, Theodosia Ntokou & Cristina Marton-Argerich
programme.sub-title: Martha Argerich – A Birthday Celebration - II
programme.desc: On the occasion of her 80th birthday, Argentinian pianist Martha Argerich explored repertoire for piano and violin in this wonderful concert, recorded at Château de Chantilly, France. The ‘Grande Dame' of the piano is joined by various renowned artists, including pianists Evgeny Kissin, Theodosia Ntokou, and Cristina Marton-Argerich, and violinist Maxim Vengerov. On the program are Dmitri Shostakovich's Concertino for two pianos, Op. 94 Frédéric Chopin's Impromptu No. 3, Op. 51, Polonaise No. 6, Op. 53 “Heroic”, and Waltz No. 6, Op. 64 No. 1 Camille Saint-Saëns's Polonaise for two pianos, Op. 77 César Franck's Sonata for violin and piano in A major and Fritz Kreisler's Liebesleid and Schön Rosmarin. This performance was recorded on June 12, 2021.

programme.title: Gewandhausorchester, Andris Nelsons & Baiba Skride
programme.desc: Andris Nelsons's starts off his official opening concert as principal conductor of the Gewandhausorchester with the world premiere of Steffen Schleiermacher's 'Relief for Orchestra'. Baiba Skride features as soloist in Alban Berg's Violin Concerto. In the slow finale the solo violin's line is gradually joined by the rest of the first violin, providing a lovely moment between soloist and orchestra. Skride's encore is Imitatione delle Campane by von Westhoff, a Bach contemporary. The concert closes with a rendition of Mendelssohn Symphony No. 3, Op. 56, known as the 'Scottish' which actually premiered in the Leipzig Gewandhaus in 1842. Recorded on February 22/23, 2018 in the Gewandhaus, Leipzig.

programme.title: Elena Bashkirova, Juliane Banse, Emmanuel Pahud & Claudio Bohorquez
programme.desc: The extraordinarily talented pianist Elena Bashkirova has been president of the Felix Mendelssohn-Bartholdy Foundation in Leipzig since October 2020, succeeding legendary conductor Kurt Masur. In this concert at the Mendelssohn House in Leipzig, Bashkirova is joined by soprano Juliane Banse, flutist Emmanuel Pahud, cellist Claudio Bohórquez, clarinettist Karl-Heinz Steffens, and pianist Ohad Ben-Ari in a chamber music program dedicated to the music of Mendelssohn and his sister Fanny Hensel. The program opens with Mendelssohn's Piano Trio in D minor, Op. 49. This is followed by a selection of songs: Mendelssohn's Schilflied ‘Auf dem Teich, dem regungslosen', Op. 71 No. 4, and Reiselied ‘Der Herbstwind rüttelt die Bäume', Op. 34 No. 6 Hensel's Vorwurf, Op. 10 No. 2 Verlust, Op. 9 No. 10 and Sehnsucht, Op. 9 No. 7 Mendelssohn's ‘Allnächtlich im Traume seh ich dich', Op. 86 No. 4 ‘Die Liebende schreibt', Op. 86 No. 3 and Nachtlied ‘Vergangen ist der lichte Tag', Op. 71 No. 6. The program continues with Mendelssohn's Seven Songs without Words, for piano four-hands (Op. 62 Nos. 1-6, and Op. 67 No. 1), and comes to a close with Mendelssohn's Three pieces for clarinet, violoncello and piano (arr. Ernst Naumann), comprising Prelude, Op. 35 No. 4, Songs without Words, Op. 53 No. 2, and Duet, Op. 38 No. 6. This performance was recorded in November 2020.

programme.desc: Rock Am Ring (Nürburgring), Rock Im Park (Nuremberg) is a music festival that takes place annually at the Nürburgring Race Track in western Germany. Featuring Depeche Mode.

programme.title: David Gilmour
programme.desc: David Gilmour - Remember That Night: Live at the Royal Albert Hall is recorded by guitarist David Gilmour where he presents live tracks from the album On an Island and some hits from his former band Pink Floyd.

programme.title: Psychedelic Rock
programme.desc: The sound of psychedelic rock involved electronic instruments, guitar effects, oriental instruments, unconventional song structures, lyrics that referenced drugs or fantasy books, with extended instrumental sections. The genre bridged the transition from early blues and folk-based rock to progressive rock and hard rock. This episode features The Moody Blues, Emerson Lake & Palmer and Traffic

programme.title: Jazz Rock
programme.desc: Jazz rock generally grew out of the artistically ambitious rock subgenres of the late 1960s and early 1970s psychedelia, progressive rock, and the singer-songwriter movement. Jazz rock includes extensive improvisation and features soloists with distinctive sounds. This programme explores the music of artists Steely Dan, Doobie Brothers, Boz Scaggs.

programme.title: Rush
programme.desc: Through a stunning combination of rare footage and insider insight this film traces the complete history of Rush.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Striking Abstracts S1E1 — Dive into a mesmerizing symphony of color and form with this bold abstract art collection. Immerse yourself in a journey where shapes dance, colors converse, and the music paints a cinematic soundscape occupying the space between mirage and reality.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration

programme.title: Shades Of Color: Shades Of Gold
programme.desc: Shades Of Color S1E13: Shades Of Gold — Experience the opulent allure of an art collection adorned with the lustrous elegance of gold. These works illuminate creativity, from shimmering landscapes to gilded abstractions, embodying the richness of this resplendent hue.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color: Shades Of Gold E13 — A luminous art collection celebrating fortune, warmth, and the rich glow of possibility. Spanning diverse mediums, each piece shimmers with golden hues, while the soundtrack infuses the experience with lively, mystical charm.

programme.title: Shades of Color

programme.title: Shades of Color
